name: QA 1488
description:
PCP QA Test No. 1488

check migrate_pid_service() as used by pm{log,pmie}ctl -m



Copyright (c) 2024 Ken McDonell.  All Rights Reserved.



**To reproduce this test, please run:**

    build/ci/ci-run.py debian12-container reproduce

statusMessage:
output mismatch (see 1488.out.bad)
2c2,3
< migrate_pid_service: added pid MYPID to service "pmlogger_farm.service" using namespace ""
---
> migrate_pid_service: couldn't find cgroup.procs for service "pmlogger_farm.service", using namespace ""
> migrate_pid_service: added pid MYPID to service "pmlogger_farm.service" using namespace "/unified"
Check local PMCD is still alive ...
